title: Checkout requests timing out after morning traffic increase
symptoms: p95 latency above 20 seconds and 504 responses during checkout after morning traffic increase.
rootCause: Database connection pool exhausted after traffic surge.
resolution: Raised pool capacity, cleared leaked connections, and added saturation alerts.

symptoms: Payment authorizations return 502 errors and provider timeout rate is elevated after morning traffic increase.
rootCause: Payment provider circuit breaker opened after upstream latency increase.
resolution: Failed over to secondary provider and tuned circuit-breaker thresholds.

title: Email notifications delayed after morning traffic increase
symptoms: Email queue depth rises and delivery latency exceeds SLA after morning traffic increase.
rootCause: SMTP provider rate limit was exceeded.
resolution: Throttled sends, retried backlog, and added rate-limit controls.

title: Customer profile API slow after morning traffic increase
symptoms: Profile reads have high p95 latency and intermittent 503 errors after morning traffic increase.
rootCause: Downstream customer database replica was overloaded.
resolution: Rerouted reads to healthy replica and added replica capacity.

symptoms: Profile reads have high p95 latency and intermittent 503 errors during a production deployment.

title: Incorrect price shown at checkout after morning traffic increase
symptoms: Checkout price differs from catalog price for active promotions after morning traffic increase.
rootCause: Promotion cache served stale rule version.
resolution: Invalidated promotion cache and added version-consistency checks.

title: Product search returns empty results after morning traffic increase
symptoms: Search requests succeed but return empty result sets for popular terms after morning traffic increase.
rootCause: Search index shard was unavailable during rebalance.
resolution: Restored shard allocation and paused rebalance during peak traffic.

title: Service pods restarting after morning traffic increase
symptoms: Multiple production pods restart and request error rate increases after morning traffic increase.
rootCause: Node memory pressure triggered pod eviction.
resolution: Drained unhealthy node, increased memory requests, and added node-pressure alerts.

title: Service pods restarting during a production deployment
symptoms: Multiple production pods restart and request error rate increases during a production deployment.
rootCause: Node memory pressure triggered pod eviction.
resolution: Drained unhealthy node, increased memory requests, and added node-pressure alerts.
